---
title: "Edward Augustus Freeman"
---

## Edward Augustus Freeman

**Dates:** (1823-1892)

### Description

historian

### Biography

Friend and collaborator of CMY, father of Margaret and Florence Freeman. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 2d [1900]
- Letter from Sept 10th 1892
- Letter from Aug 31st 1889
- Letter from July 4th 1889
- Letter from June 10th 1889
- Letter from Sept 5th 1888
- Letter from Oct 29th 1887
- Letter from April 25th [187?] [[footnote:1]]
- Letter from March 8th 1879
- Letter from Jan 1st 1879
- Letter from Oct 22d 1877 
- Letter from Sept 25th [1877] 
- Letter from Sept 11th 1877 
- Letter from Aug 15th 1877 
- Letter from Aug 4th 1877 
- Letter from July 7th 1877 
- Letter from Sept 12th 1876
- Letter from September 6th 1876
- Letter from April 13th1875
- Letter from Jany 27th 1875

*... and 11 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
